  "key_event": "Taif Agreement ends Civil War under Syrian tutelage.",
  "reasoning": "The end of the Civil War dramatically increased state power by re-establishing central authority and disarming most militias, even under Syrian control. Conversely, society's power, formerly expressed through militia mobilization, decreased significantly as it was demobilized, co-opted, and fragmented by the new sectarian political order.",
